guardrails: W1.5.225 routes W1.5.224 planned remaining blockers into reviewer-owned package routes only.

W1.5.225 does not implement runtime/Desktop production behavior, accepted spec changes, ADR changes, schema changes, generated schema changes, dependency changes, packaging, updater work, or baseline docx changes.
